---
name: Built with Agent Workspace (Showcase)
about: Share an integration, example, or project you built using Agent Workspace!
title: "[SHOWCASE] "
labels: showcase
assignees: ""
---

**What did you build?**
A short description of your project or workflow.

**Which agents are coordinating?**
E.g., "A researcher agent in Python and a reviewer agent in TypeScript."

**Which primitives did you use?**

- [ ] Tasks
- [ ] Inbox / Messages
- [ ] Sessions / Check-in
- [ ] Locks
- [ ] Handoffs

**Link to project or demo (optional)**
If public, share the GitHub repo or a recorded demo!
